title: GATE Answer Key 2025 Released

detail.title: GATE Answer Key 2025 Released
detail.short_info: GATE Answer Key 2025 - Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering Answer Sheet 2025 has been released. If they find a major deviation in the GATE Answer Key 2025 that is given out, then the candidates can pose back the question to the authority. Queries will not be accepted if candidates raise questions after the last date for the GATE Answer Key 2025. Hence candidates have to check up with the details of the dates carefully related to GATE Answer Key 2025 read this article.

content.text: GATE Answer Key 2025 - GATE Answer Key 2025 has been released by the IIT Roorkee soon on its official website through Online mode for gate2025.iitr.ac.in. The Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (GATE) was carried out by the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee Authority. And officials will also announce the GATE 2025 Provisional Answer Key on 27-02-2025. The candidates must check the GATE Answer Key 2025 to check the answers they had provided and the answers that are given by the Authority

Candidates can refer to the GATE Answer Key 2025 so that they will get an idea about their scores. So every candidate who appeared for the GATE Exam 2025 should check the official Answer key 2025 which will be released on the IIT Roorkee official website. If candidates find any answer deviations in it, then the candidates can raise grievances against it by giving their objection. It is to be noted that the objection of candidates will be considered only during the release of the initial release of the GATE Answer Key 2025.
Check GATE Answer Key 2025 (Final Answer Key) For gate2025.iitr.ac.in

sections.heading: How to Download the GATE Answer Key 2025?

content.text: Candidates can follow the below steps to check and download GATE Answer Key 2025.

items: Visit the official website of GATE - gate2025.iitr.ac.in.
Search and click on the notification “Answer keys released” on the homepage.
Provide Roll Number and Date of Birth.
GATE Answer Key 2025 will appear on the screen.
Download and save it for future references
